title: Cannot enter podman image setup using distrobox
body:
`podman run ghcr.io/ublue-os/bazzite-deck-nvidia` 

Throws error

`Error: crun: cannot find `` in $PATH: No such file or directory: OCI runtime attempted to invoke a command that was not found`

Alternatively, 

`podman run -v /:/home/abhinav --rm ghcr.io/ublue-os/bazzite-deck-nvidia` 

Throws error 

> Error: crun: creating \`home/\`: openat2 \`home\`: No such file or directory: OCI runtime attempted to invoke a command that was not found

comments.body: I dont think the image in question is meant to be run.  I dont believe there is a command associated with it to be run as a container.  in looking at the project docs, it looks like it is meant to be put onto your OS with rpm-ostree.

Yes this image doesn't specify an entrypoint or command so there is nothing to execute, you would need to run this like for example to start a shell
```
podman run -it ghcr.io/ublue-os/bazzite-deck-nvidia /bin/bash
```
